tools.name: negotiableQuotePricesUpdated.negotiableQuoteNegotiableQuotePriceManagementV1PricesUpdatedPost
tools.description: Refreshes item prices, taxes, discounts, cart rules in the negotiable quote as per the latest changes in the catalog / shared catalog and in the price rules. Depending on the negotiable quote state and totals, all or just some of quote numbers will be recalculated. 'Update Prices' parameter forces refresh on any quote that is not locked for admin user, including the quotes with a negotiated price. The request can be applied to one or more quotes at the same time.
